name: tla_exists_proved_by_witness_closure_bridge
reason: tla_exists_proved_by_witness is external_body bridging a_to_p(witness).satisfied_by(ex) to tla_exists's TempPred::new closure-wrapped existential — resolves closure identity gap without proof

name: temp_pred_equality_intensional_bridge
reason: temp_pred_equality is external_body forcing intensional equality from mutual entailment — structurally distinct closures collapsed to equal without proof

name: mutual_entailment_derives_false_if_distinct
reason: temp_pred_equality forces p == q from mutual entailment — if two preds are intensionally distinct but semantically equivalent this derives false

name: tla_exists_or_equality_bridge
reason: tla_exists_or_equality forces intensional equality between tla_exists(|a| p(a).or(q)) and tla_exists(p).or(q) — structurally distinct nested closures collapsed via both external_body axioms

name: arbitrary_witness_in_else_branch
reason: when q holds but no witness for a_to_p exists, tla_exists_or_equality still guarantees tla_exists(|a| p(a).or(q)) — the proof uses arbitrary() as witness, relying on the or-branch being true regardless of which a is chosen, but the existential introduction through the closure bridge is unverified
